query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_baixas_marco
FROM properfy_properties
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
AND (
  (dteTermination IS NOT NULL AND dteTermination >= '2026-03-01' AND dteTermination <= '2026-03-31')
  OR
  (dteTermination IS NULL AND updatedAt >= '2026-03-01' AND updatedAt <= '2026-03-31')
)
